_README: Master profile — the keystone input. Stages 1 (sourcing criteria), 2 (ranking rubric) and 4 (CV/cover-letter tailoring) all read this file. Fill in every TODO with real content. Be honest: skills are split into 'proven' (demonstrable on the CV / in interviews today) and 'developing' (actively learning, evidenced but NOT yet expertise). The ranking rubric uses this split so drafts never overclaim. Keep it accurate over impressive — an inflated profile gets filtered out or caught in interviews.

identity.work_authorization: TODO — e.g. 'EU work permit / French resident' — used to filter roles and answer screening questions honestly

links.github: TODO — link to the repo for THIS pipeline + the Flutter/Supabase app (these are the portfolio evidence)

positioning.summary: Integration & validation engineer (~7 yrs, automotive embedded systems, mostly RENAULT) deliberately moving toward AI engineering. Strongest today on systems integration, test strategy, validation and supplier coordination; actively building AI-engineering skills with concrete projects as evidence.
positioning.honesty_note: Do NOT describe AI engineering or Flutter as established expertise anywhere. They are a credible, evidenced direction — not a track record yet.

proven._note: Demonstrable on the CV and defensible in an interview TODAY. These are the anchor of any 'core'-track application.
domains: Test strategy & execution (HIL benches, lab/factory, functional & non-functional)
Anomaly diagnosis, risk tracking, KPI reporting
technical: Tools: Vector CANalyzer, DDT2000, JIRA, DOORS, Confluence, MagicDraw
Python, VBA, C/C++ — used for test automation & KPI tooling

developing._note: Actively learning, with evidence — but explicitly NOT expertise. Frame as growth direction. Each item SHOULD point at concrete evidence.

items.status: learning — AI foundations & fluency in progress
items.evidence: This job-hunt pipeline (agent orchestration, MCP, SQLite schema, RAG-adjacent scoring). Certifications: 'Claude Code 101' and 'AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations' (Anthropic Education, 2026).

items.status: early — several personal apps built with AI assistance
items.evidence: Home Chore Quest (gamified chore manager — Flutter, Riverpod, Material 3; github.com/hrpprojecthamouda-collab/home-chore-quest); Zehani Physio (physiotherapy practice manager — Flutter/Dart); EventMates (social event planning — Flutter/Dart). AI-assisted builds.

items.skill: Python as a software-engineering core (beyond test tooling)
items.evidence: This pipeline's codebase (Stages 1-4, lib/ modules, Claude API integration).

targets._note: Two tracks, matching the jobs.track column. Stage 2 ranks each job against the rubric for its track.

core.label: Land-today roles built on proven experience

bridge.label: Realistic AI-adjacent stretch roles in or near his domain
titles: ML / Data Engineer for testing & validation
bridge.seniority: junior-to-mid for AI-core; mid for tooling/data

targets.out_of_scope: Roles requiring relocation outside the Paris region are out of scope. Open to both CDI and CDD/freelance — contract type is not a filter.

work_authorization_resolved: EU citizen — authorized to work in France with no employer sponsorship needed. Treat visa/sponsorship restrictions on a posting as a non-issue, never a blocker.
deal_breakers: Pure IT infrastructure / sysadmin / network / security roles (e.g. ingénieur système & réseau, administrateur, Citrix/firewall/Active Directory/cloud-ops, ingénieur sécurité SI, DevOps/SecOps, support poste de travail/workplace). These concern IT operations, NOT embedded/automotive systems engineering — auto-skip even when the title contains 'Ingénieur Systèmes'.

Senior / Lead / Principal / Architect AI-ML or Data roles requiring years of production ML/data engineering (e.g. Lead/Senior/Tech Lead Data Engineer, Senior AI Engineer, ML Platform Architect). Out of reach given AI/data is a developing — not proven — skill. Auto-skip. (Junior / career-changer-friendly AI-adjacent roles are NOT excluded — those stay in the bridge track.)
_filters_note: deal_breakers are HARD exclusions: the ranker forces fit_score < 45 (status 'skip') for any job matching one, regardless of other fit. Two rules active: (1) pure IT/sysadmin/network/security ops roles, (2) senior/lead AI-ML/data roles. Strategy unchanged: embedded/validation is the priority; junior AI-adjacent roles remain low-scored stretches, not excluded. must_haves stays empty (no positive hard requirement); location is soft (sourcing is already Paris/IDF-scoped).

preferences._note: Soft signals — nudge fit_score up or down, never hard-filter.
preferences.work_mode: Hybrid preferred — nudge hybrid roles up; do not penalize on-site heavily (it's acceptable).
preferences.contract_type: Open to CDI and CDD/freelance alike — no preference, not a filter.
preferences.domain_interest: Automotive/embedded is fine (core track). For bridge track, favor roles building real AI/data products or modern tooling — that's the growth direction.
preferences.salary_expectation: €45,000–€55,000 gross/year. Soft signal: roles clearly far below this band nudge down; missing salary (common in FR postings) is neutral, not a penalty.

cv_source_material._note: Raw material Stage 4 draws on to tailor a CV variant. Keep this richer than the CV itself — bullet achievements with metrics where possible. Stage 4 SELECTS and rephrases from here; it must not invent.

highlights: Piloted integration strategy & system test activities on prototype vehicles for critical physical tests (crash, climate, track)
Integrated complex systems (ADAS, Powertrain); validated E/E architecture coherence ahead of series production
Built Python/VBA automation tools for KPI reporting
TODO — add metrics: how many vehicles / ECUs / time saved?

highlights: Defined & functionally piloted the central data-collection (Upload) system across 3 vehicle ranges
Coordinated international suppliers on software issues; managed complex system interfaces

experience.role: Co-Responsable Intégration & Validation Système E/E (Consultant via Akkodis)
highlights: Operational lead for test lots on the E/E integration platform (HIL bench/lab) for new models
Early risk/drift identification via rigorous anomaly tracking (project core team)

experience.role: Ingénieur Test & Validation — Embedded Systems (Consultant via Serma)
highlights: System validation of connected services (IVI): TCP/IP, Ethernet, cellular connectivity
Defined & ran functional/non-functional test plans on factory/lab benches
Complex log analysis & network diagnosis for critical embedded systems
Led user acceptance testing (UAT); coordinated partners for ERP/CRM sync
Business-needs analysis, anomaly tracking, test-phase reporting

education.institution: École Nationale des Sciences et Technologies Avancées de Borj-Cedria, Tunisie

side_projects.name: Home Chore Quest
side_projects.what: Application mobile multiplateforme de gestion des tâches ménagères, ludifiée (quêtes, XP, niveaux). Conception architecture, gestion d'état, interface.

side_projects.what: Application de gestion pour cabinet de kinésithérapie : dossiers patients, planification de rendez-vous.

side_projects.name: EventMates
side_projects.what: Application sociale de création et d'organisation d'événements entre amis : planification partagée, invitations, coordination de groupe.

side_projects.name: Job-hunt automation pipeline (this project)
side_projects.what: Pipeline semi-autonome : orchestration d'agents, intégration MCP, schéma SQLite, scoring proche du RAG, points de validation humaine.
side_projects.why_it_matters: Strongest single AI-engineering portfolio piece for the pivot

cover_letter_voice._note: Guides Stage 4's cover-letter tone so drafts sound like him, not generic.
cover_letter_voice.tone: TODO — e.g. 'direct, concrete, no fluff; lead with evidence not adjectives'
cover_letter_voice.narrative: TODO — the one-paragraph story of the pivot he wants to tell: validation depth + deliberate, evidenced move into AI
avoid: claiming AI expertise he doesn't have
